  "society_power": 7.7,
  "state_power": 7.8,
  "society_change": 0.2,
  "state_change": -1.1,
  "key_event": "Chartist Movement and Repeal of Corn Laws",
  "reasoning": "The Chartist movement and repeal of the Corn Laws strengthened civil society's capacity for mobilization and political reform, while the state's response to the Irish Potato Famine and economic shifts slightly weakened its legitimacy and control."
